C.  20551 DIVISION OF BANKINGSUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: ATTACHMENTS TRANSMITTED ELECTRONICALLY BELOW CMP MATRIX SUGGESTED CIVIL MONEY PENALTY ASSESSMENTS 3.  For example, only the Federal Reserve can assess fines against bank holding companies and their institution-affiliated parties.  Return to text
